mapper.insert: INSERT INTO application (user_id, license_no, license_url, law_firm, practice_start_year, apply_type, status, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{licenseNo}, #{licenseUrl}, #{lawFirm}, #{practiceStartYear}, #{applyType}, 0, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT a.application_id, a.user_id, a.license_no, a.license_url, a.law_firm, a.practice_start_year, a.status, a.reject_reason, a.create_time, a.audit_time, a.apply_type, u.username, uv.real_name AS realname FROM application a LEFT JOIN users u ON a.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN users_verfications uv ON a.user_id = uv.user_id WHERE a.application_id = #{applicationId}

SELECT a.application_id, a.user_id, a.license_no, a.license_url, a.law_firm, a.practice_start_year, a.status, a.reject_reason, a.create_time, a.audit_time, a.apply_type, u.username, u.avatar_url, uv.real_name AS realname FROM application a LEFT JOIN users u ON a.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN users_verfications uv ON a.user_id = uv.user_id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY a.create_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT a.application_id, a.user_id, a.license_no, a.license_url, a.law_firm, a.practice_start_year, a.status, a.reject_reason, a.create_time, a.audit_time, a.apply_type, u.username, u.avatar_url, uv.real_name AS realname FROM application a LEFT JOIN users u ON a.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN users_verfications uv ON a.user_id = uv.user_id ORDER BY a.application_id DESC

SELECT a.application_id, a.user_id, a.license_no, a.license_url, a.law_firm, a.practice_start_year, a.status, a.reject_reason, a.create_time, a.audit_time, a.apply_type, u.username, u.avatar_url, uv.real_name AS realname FROM application a LEFT JOIN users u ON a.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN users_verfications uv ON a.user_id = uv.user_id WHERE a.status = 0 ORDER BY a.create_time ASC
